title: Property Consultant - Brigade Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Brigade Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Brigade Group are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Brigade Group:
Brigade Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brigade Group!
